rules.name: Windows Failed Logon
rules.recommended_action: Review failed logon source, affected account, and check if a successful login followed.

rules.name: Local Group Membership Enumerated
rules.recommended_action: Validate whether enumeration was expected. Correlate with 4624, 4625, 4672, and 4688 events.

rules.name: Process Creation
rules.recommended_action: Review process command line, parent process, user context, and suspicious script execution.

rules.name: Windows Security Log Cleared
rules.recommended_action: Escalate immediately. Identify account that cleared logs and preserve endpoint evidence.
